name: fai-datadog-plugin
description: Datadog integration plugin for FAI — 4 MCP tools, dedicated agent, compatible plays

tools.name: datadog_monitor_create
tools.description: Create a Datadog monitor with thresholds, notifications, and escalation policies

tools.name: datadog_event_search
tools.description: Search Datadog events by tags, time range, priority, and source

tools.name: datadog_metric_query
tools.description: Query Datadog metrics with aggregation, grouping, and time series

tools.name: datadog_dashboard_create
tools.description: Create a Datadog dashboard with widgets for AI system observability
